title: Love Thy Neighbor - The Story of Christian Riley Garcia
original_title: Love Thy Neighbor: The Story of Christian Riley Garcia
overview: On May 18, 2018, Christian Riley Garcia was among the 10 who were shot and killed in the Santa Fe high school shooting. This film will examine the impact of his heroic actions and his families fight for healing in the wakes of their loss.
